reference: She might be having pharyngitis. Give her paracetamol, throat soothers like milk and honey, and ask her to do saltwater gargling. If the fever does not settle, it might be a bacterial infection, then she can be started on amoxicillin or azithromycin.
text: She might be having pharyngitis; give her paracetamol, throat soothers like milk and honey, and ask her to do salt-water gargling. If the fever does not settle, it might be a bacterial infection, then she can be started on amoxicillin or azithromycin.
